title: conyza pyrrhopappa subsp. oblongifolia
intro: Conyza pyrrhopappa subsp. oblongifolia, a plant species belonging to the daisy family, is also known as a type of fleabane. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Conyza pyrrhopappa subsp. oblongifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, with the dried leaves and flowers being used in herbal remedies.
